title: Interstellar
description: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival as Earth becomes uninhabitable. Directed by Christopher Nolan, this epic sci-fi adventure explores the boundaries of love, time, and sacrifice across dimensions.

title: Inception
description: A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a C.E.O. Christopher Nolan delivers a mind-bending thriller.

title: The Dark Knight
description: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc and chaos on the people of Gotham, Batman must accept one of the greatest psychological and physical tests of his ability to fight injustice.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
description: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in search for her homeland with the aid of a group of female prisoners, a psychotic worshiper, and a drifter named Max.

title: The Terminator
description: A human soldier is sent from 2029 to 1984 to stop an almost indestructible cyborg killing machine, sent from the same year, which has been programmed to execute a young woman whose unborn son is the key to humanity's future salvation.

title: Avengers: Endgame
description: After the devastating events of Infinity War, the universe is in ruins. With the help of remaining allies, the Avengers assemble once more to reverse Thanos' actions and restore balance to the universe.

title: A Quiet Place
description: In a post-apocalyptic world, a family is forced to live in silence while hiding from monsters with ultra-sensitive hearing. A gripping thriller from director John Krasinski.

title: Blade Runner 2049
description: Young Blade Runner K's discovery of a long-buried secret leads him on a quest to find Rick Deckard, a former Blade Runner who has been missing for thirty years. A stunning sci-fi sequel.

title: The Matrix
description: When a beautiful stranger leads computer hacker Neo to a forbidding underworld, he discovers the shocking truth — the life he knows is the elaborate deception of an evil cyber-intelligence.

title: Gravity
description: A medical engineer and an astronaut work together to survive after an accident leaves them adrift in space. A visually stunning survival story directed by Alfonso Cuaron.

title: Dangal
description: Former wrestler Mahavir Singh Phogat trains his daughters Geeta and Babita to become world-class wrestlers, challenging societal norms in rural India. Based on an incredible true story.

title: 3 Idiots
description: Two friends are searching for their long lost companion, recounting their days in engineering college and the profound impact their friend had on their lives. A timeless Bollywood classic.

title: Baahubali: The Beginning
description: In ancient India, an adventurous and daring man becomes involved in a decades-old feud between two warring peoples. An epic saga of power, justice, and destiny.

title: Bajrangi Bhaijaan
description: An Indian man with a heart of gold undertakes a perilous journey to reunite a mute Pakistani girl with her family across the border. A heartwarming tale of humanity.

title: PK
description: An alien on Earth loses the only device he can use to communicate with his spaceship, and must rely on humans to help him retrieve it. A satirical comedy about religion and society.

title: Andhadhun
description: A series of mysterious events change the life of a blind pianist, who must now report a murder he should not have seen. A darkly comic thriller that keeps you guessing.

title: War
description: An Indian soldier is tasked with eliminating his former mentor who has gone rogue. A high-octane action spectacle with stunning fight sequences and exotic locations.

title: Padmaavat
description: Set in medieval Rajasthan, Queen Padmavati is married to a noble king but their peaceful life is disrupted when a ruthless sultan hears of her beauty and lays siege to their fortress.

title: Dhoom 3
description: Trained as a circus entertainer by his father, a man seeks revenge against a corrupt bank in Chicago that destroyed his family. The biggest heist film in Bollywood history.

title: Drishyam
description: A man takes desperate measures to save his family from the dark side of the law after they commit an unexpected crime. A gripping cat-and-mouse thriller that redefined the genre in India.

title: Your Name
description: Two teenagers share a profound, magical connection upon discovering they are swapping bodies. A breathtaking anime from Makoto Shinkai about fate, connection, and time.

title: Spirited Away
description: During her family's move to the suburbs, a sullen 10-year-old girl wanders into a world ruled by gods, witches, and spirits. Hayao Miyazaki's Oscar-winning masterpiece.

title: Attack on Titan: Chronicle
description: A compilation film covering the first three seasons of the hit anime series Attack on Titan, where humanity fights for survival against giant humanoid creatures.

title: Demon Slayer: Mugen Train
description: After a series of mysterious disappearances on the Mugen Train, Tanjiro and his companions must face a deadly demon aboard. The highest-grossing anime film of all time.

title: Weathering with You
description: A high-school boy who has run away to Tokyo befriends a girl who appears to be able to manipulate the weather. Another stunning visual feast from Makoto Shinkai.

title: Suzume
description: A young girl discovers a mysterious door and must close supernatural portals across Japan to prevent catastrophic disasters. Shinkai's latest adventure blends fantasy and reality.

title: My Hero Academia: Heroes Rising
description: Class 1-A visits Nabu Island to do hero work, but a villain with a devastating quirk arrives to destroy everything. Deku and his friends must protect the island at all costs.

title: One Piece Film: Gold
description: The Straw Hat Pirates arrive at Gran Tesoro, a ship and entertainment city ruled by Gild Tesoro. When they discover his dark schemes, a massive battle ensues on the grandest stage.

title: Naruto the Movie: Road to Ninja
description: Naruto and Sakura are trapped in an alternate reality where Naruto's parents are alive and Sakura's are dead. They must find a way back while confronting a mysterious enemy.

title: Dragon Ball Super: Broly
description: Goku and Vegeta encounter Broly, a Saiyan warrior unlike any they've faced before. An epic battle threatens the very fabric of the universe in this explosive Dragon Ball adventure.

title: Parasite
description: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Park family and the destitute Kim clan. Bong Joon-ho's Palme d'Or and Oscar-winning masterpiece.

title: Oldboy
description: After being kidnapped and imprisoned for fifteen years, Oh Dae-Su is released, only to find that he must find his captor in five days. A revenge thriller that redefined the genre.

title: Train to Busan
description: While a zombie virus breaks out in South Korea, passengers struggle to survive on the train from Seoul to Busan. One of the best zombie films ever made.

title: The Man from Nowhere
description: A quiet pawnshop keeper with a violent past takes on a drug-and-organ trafficking ring to save a little girl who is his only friend. Korea's answer to Leon: The Professional.

title: A Tale of Two Sisters
description: A family is torn apart by the return of a cruel stepmother and the suspicious death of the mother. A psychological horror that inspired the American remake The Uninvited.

title: Memories of Murder
description: In a small Korean province in 1986, two detectives struggle with the case of multiple young women being found raped and murdered. Based on Korea's first serial murder case, directed by Bong Joon-ho.

title: The Wailing
description: A stranger arrives in a small village, and soon after, a mysterious sickness starts spreading. A policeman must solve the mystery before his own daughter falls victim to the disease.

title: I Saw the Devil
description: A secret agent exacts revenge on a serial killer who murdered his fiancee, but his pursuit of vengeance becomes increasingly brutal and blurs the line between justice and monstrosity.

title: Interstellar — Hindi Dubbed
description: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival. Hindi dubbed version of Christopher Nolan's sci-fi epic.

title: The Matrix — Hindi Dubbed
description: When a beautiful stranger leads computer hacker Neo to a forbidding underworld, he discovers the shocking truth — the life he knows is the elaborate deception of an evil cyber-intelligence.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road — Hindi
description: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in search for her homeland with the aid of a group of female prisoners and a drifter named Max.

title: Avengers: Endgame — Hindi
description: After the devastating events of Infinity War, the Avengers assemble once more to reverse Thanos' actions and restore balance. Hindi dubbed version of the epic conclusion.

title: Jurassic World — Hindi Dubbed
description: A new theme park, built on the original site of Jurassic Park, creates a genetically modified hybrid dinosaur that escapes containment and goes on a killing spree.

title: The Dark Knight Rises — Hindi
description: Eight years after the Joker's reign of chaos, Batman is coerced out of exile to save Gotham City from the mercenary Bane. The epic conclusion to Nolan's Dark Knight trilogy.

title: Inception — Hindi Dubbed
description: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea. The mind-bending thriller now in Hindi.

title: Spider-Man: No Way Home — Hindi
description: With Spider-Man's identity now revealed, Peter asks Doctor Strange for help. When a spell goes wrong, dangerous foes from other worlds start appearing.

title: Arrival
description: A linguist works with the military to communicate with alien lifeforms after twelve mysterious spacecraft appear around the world. A cerebral sci-fi masterpiece about language and time.

title: Ex Machina
description: A young programmer is selected to participate in a ground-breaking experiment in synthetic intelligence by evaluating the human qualities of a highly advanced humanoid A.I.

title: Oblivion
description: A veteran assigned to extract Earth's remaining resources begins to question what he knows about his mission and himself. Tom Cruise in a visually stunning sci-fi adventure.

title: John Wick
description: An ex-hit-man comes out of retirement to track down the gangsters that killed his dog and took everything from him. Keanu Reeves in the action film that launched a franchise.

title: Gladiator
description: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family and sent him into slavery. Russell Crowe in Ridley Scott's epic.
King Leonidas of Sparta leads a force of 300 warriors to defend the pass at Thermopylae against the invading Persian army. A visually groundbreaking action spectacle.

title: The Raid: Redemption
description: A S.W.A.T. team becomes trapped in a tenement run by a ruthless mobster and his army of killers and thugs. One of the greatest martial arts action films ever made.

title: Kill Bill: Volume 1
description: After awakening from a four-year coma, a former assassin wreaks vengeance on the team of assassins who betrayed her. Quentin Tarantino's stylish revenge epic.

title: Die Hard
description: An NYPD officer tries to save his wife and several others taken hostage by German terrorists during a Christmas party at the Nakatomi Plaza. The quintessential action film.

title: Django Unchained
description: With the help of a German bounty hunter, a freed slave sets out to rescue his wife from a brutal plantation owner in Mississippi. Tarantino's revisionist Western masterpiece.

title: Frozen — Hindi Dubbed
description: When the newly crowned Queen Elsa accidentally uses her power to turn things into ice and curses her home, her sister Anna teams up with a mountain man to reverse the curse.

title: The Conjuring
description: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren work to help a family terrorized by a dark presence in their farmhouse. Based on a terrifying true story.

title: Shutter Island
description: A U.S. Marshal investigates the disappearance of a murderer who escaped from a hospital for the criminally insane. Martin Scorsese delivers a mind-bending psychological thriller.

title: Train to Busan Presents: Peninsula
description: A zombie virus has swept the Korean peninsula. A former soldier returns on a mission to retrieve a truck full of money but finds survivors and ruthless militias instead.
